privileged_info_summary: The task restores a Jenkins Pipeline job (WorkflowJob) named 'Production-Deploy-Pipeline' from a backup file located at '/home/ga/jenkins_backup/Production-Deploy-Pipeline-config.xml'. The job configuration includes two pipeline parameters (DEPLOY_ENV and BUILD_TYPE), an SCM polling trigger with schedule 'H/15 * * * *', and log rotation configured to keep 10 builds. All metadata values have been verified against the actual XML job configuration hardcoded in the setup script.
